articles.title: GHSA: ParquetSharp: Possible Stack Overflow When Reading a ParquetFile with Large Decimal Type Width
articles.summary:
`DecimalConverter.ReadDecimal` makes a stackalloc using what might be an attacker-supplied value. If an attacker declares a decimal column with some unreasonable width, this could lead to a stack overflow. In a service environment, this would potentially take down a service.

This affects applications using ParquetSharp to read untrusted Parquet files in a network service.

AWS Encryption SDK (ESDK) for Python is a client-side encryption library. articles.title: GHSA: OpenMage LTS has a Path Traversal Filter Bypass in Dataflow Module
articles.summary:
The Dataflow module in OpenMage LTS uses a weak blacklist filter (`str_replace('../', '', $input)`) to prevent path traversal attacks. This filter can be bypassed using patterns like `..././` or `....//`, which after the replacement still result in `../`. An authenticated administrator can exploit this to read arbitrary files from the server filesystem.
